note: Shipped gen 200 from a paper-2001 + asymmetric-scoring (+2/0/-1) + quiescence-on + depth-curriculum 3->4->5 + max-sigma 0.5 run. Picked by fixture-spread: gen 200 had spread 1.70 across 5 test positions (peak of the run), with healthy weight magnitudes (max |w| 4.2). Beats paper-strict gen 500 (spread 1.66, max |w| 19.5) on both discrimination AND weight stability. Gens 600-700 and 1000 of this run hit transient saturation despite the sigma cap — gen 200 is firmly in the healthy phase.
